chat.send_shortcut_enter_hint: Enter to send, Shift + Enter for newline

quick_actions.hotspot_prompt: Research the latest AI trends and news, and generate a concise summary report.
quick_actions.scout_prompt: Identify high-potential AI products and business models from various directories.
quick_actions.keyword_prompt: Perform deep SEO keyword research for geosolver.app, analyze competitors, and provide an action plan.
quick_actions.backlink_prompt: Discover free, replicable, and high-value backlink submission opportunities for geosolver.app.
quick_actions.stock_prompt: Use the stock-analyzer skill to perform an intrinsic value assessment for Tencent (0700.HK). Pull the last 5 years of financial data, analyze revenue, earnings, free cash flow, ROIC, balance-sheet quality, and margin of safety, then combine the valuation with technical structure to judge whether the current price is attractive for long-term buying. Produce an actionable investment research report.
quick_actions.daily_dashboard_prompt: Use the frontend-design skill to build a directly usable local “Daily Focus Cockpit” tool for me. Requirements: single-file HTML or runnable in the current frontend stack; include today’s 3 priorities, a Pomodoro timer, completion states, lightweight stats, and localStorage persistence; the visual direction should feel like premium desktop productivity software, not a template and not a stack of ordinary cards. When finished, tell me the file path and how to open it.
